name: Lawn Care Starter Pack
description: Everything you need to get your lawn looking its best. Includes premium lawn seed mix, slow-release fertiliser, and a lawn care guide.

name: Garden Design Guide (Digital)
description: A comprehensive 30-page PDF guide covering garden design principles for Adelaide's climate. Includes plant selection, layout planning, and seasonal care tips.

name: Premium Mulch Bag (30L)
description: High-quality garden mulch to retain moisture, suppress weeds, and improve soil health. Suitable for all garden beds and ideal for Adelaide's hot summers.

name: Irrigation Planning Guide (Digital)
description: A step-by-step digital guide to planning and installing a drip irrigation system for your garden. Includes zone mapping, product recommendations, and water-saving tips.
